notes:
v2.5.5 Update
🛡️ PF2e equipment actions: Weapons and shields now expose Raise, Draw, Sheathe, Change Grip, and Drop through Manage buttons in Strike and Inventory menus.

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.5.5
announcement.content:
v2.5.5 improves PF2e weapon and shield controls.

  • Shield inventory items: Shields now appear in the PF2e Inventory menu with equipment management controls.
  • Native equipment actions: Raise, Draw, Sheathe, Change Grip, and Drop now appear in Manage menus when PF2e exposes them for a weapon or shield.
  • Strike Manage button: Strike rows now include a compact Manage button for equipment actions without duplicating every inline sheet button.
